_comment: Opportunity: Dao Fragment. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 100000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Spirit Severing), perception (Ascendant (to perceive the fragment)), and luck (modifier 0.5). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Dao Fragment
description: A fragment of natural law, condensed by ancient events. Exists because: powerful events can condense law fragments.
natural_next_event: Fragment disperses; eventually reabsorbed by heaven.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
